import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; export default function ProductCard({ product, onEdit, onDelete, canManage }) { return (

{product.title}

{product.category}

{product.description}

{product.price} ₽ Остаток: {product.stock}
Подробнее {canManage && ( <> )}
); }
